summary: Iteration 97 - Document-to-Existing-Transaction Matching and Auto-Linking feature testing complete. Backend: 19/21 tests passed (2 skipped - no unclaimed matches available). All transaction matching endpoints functional: POST /api/document-intelligence/match-transactions/{doc_id} (finds matches with overall_status and auto_link_available), GET /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{doc_id} (returns stored candidates), POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-link/{doc_id} (links to best match, rejects ambiguous), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{match_id} (confirm/reject). Frontend: Transaction Matching section displays in DocumentIntelligencePanel with candidate list, confidence bars, confirm/reject buttons, and 'Linked to Existing Transaction' state. Review queue shows transaction matching status badges.

issues: Minor - document preview shows HTTP 404 for test documents without actual files (expected behavior)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/match-transactions/{doc_id} returns 404 when no intelligence result exists
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/match-transactions/{doc_id} returns correct structure (matches, overall_status, auto_link_available, best_match, total_candidates)
Backend: Matching updates intelligence result with transaction_match_status, matched_transaction_count, auto_link_available
Backend: Matching creates activity timeline events (transaction_match_found, transaction_match_ambiguous, transaction_match_none)
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{doc_id} returns empty for docs without matching
Backend: GET /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{doc_id} returns stored candidates with correct fields
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-link/{doc_id} returns error when no matches exist
Backend: POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-link/{doc_id} rejects ambiguous matches (returns 422)
Backend: PATCH /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{match_id} returns 404 for non-existent match
Backend: PATCH confirm sets is_selected=true, match_status=confirmed, deselects others
Backend: PATCH reject sets is_selected=false, match_status=rejected, re-evaluates remaining
Backend: auto_draft_suppressed_due_to_match=true when auto_link_available=true
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/process/{id} still works
Backend: Regression - GET /api/document-intelligence/review-queue still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-draft/{id} still works
Backend: Regression - POST /api/document-intelligence/resolve-entities/{id} still works
Frontend: Document Review Queue page loads with summary cards and status filters
Frontend: Review queue shows transaction matching badges (tx match, tx ambiguous, linked)
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel shows Transaction Matching section with Re-match button
Frontend: Transaction Matching section shows candidate display with confidence and basis
Frontend: 'Linked to Existing Transaction' state displays target entity info with copy button
Frontend: Classification section shows document type and confidence bar
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service: /app/backend/services/transaction_matching_service.py - Well-structured with confidence thresholds (HIGH=0.90, MEDIUM=0.70), DOC_TYPE_TARGETS mapping for collection search
Backend: _determine_overall_status correctly computes matched (single high conf), ambiguous (multiple high/medium), unmatched
Backend: auto_link() correctly rejects ambiguous matches with 422, only links confirmed or single high-conf matches
Backend: confirm_match() deselects other candidates when confirming, re-evaluates when rejecting
Backend: Hub_documents updated with linked_transaction_type/id/display on successful link
Frontend: DocumentIntelligencePanel.js Transaction Matching section has proper data-testids for testing
Frontend: DocumentReviewQueuePage.js correctly shows tx match/ambiguous/linked badges in Reasons column

success_rate.backend: 100% (19 passed, 2 skipped - no available unconfirmed matches to test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 97 - Transaction Matching fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/document-intelligence/match-transactions/{doc_id} (finds matches), GET /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{doc_id} (stored candidates), POST /api/document-intelligence/auto-link/{doc_id} (links confirmed/high-conf match), PATCH /api/document-intelligence/transaction-matches/{match_id} (confirm/reject). Match statuses: matched, ambiguous, unmatched, confirmed, rejected. Confidence thresholds: HIGH=0.90, MEDIUM=0.70. DOC_TYPE_TARGETS: Sales_PO/customer_po -> so_drafts, AP_Invoice/invoice -> ap_intake_drafts, Freight_Document/Shipping_Document -> po_drafts. Intelligence result enriched with transaction_match_status, matched_transaction_count, auto_link_available, auto_link_created, auto_draft_suppressed_due_to_match, best_transaction_match. Hub_documents updated with linked_transaction_type/id/display on link. Key data-testids: transaction-matching-section, match-transactions-btn, auto-link-btn, tx-match-{id}, confirm-tx-{id}, reject-tx-{id}, linked-transaction, copy-link-id-btn. Collections: transaction_matches, document_intelligence_results, hub_documents, activities, so_drafts, po_drafts, ap_intake_drafts.

behavior: Returns 422 if ambiguous (multiple high-conf) without confirmation
Returns 422 if no high-conf match available
On success: links document to transaction, updates hub_documents, creates activity
Confirming: sets is_selected=true, match_status=confirmed, deselects all others
Rejecting: sets is_selected=false, match_status=rejected, re-evaluates remaining
Updates intelligence result with new overall status

features: Candidate list with confidence bars and basis info
'Linked to Existing Transaction' display with copy button

mocked_apis_note: Business Central API (BC sandbox) operates in DEMO MODE. Email service is MOCKED (in-memory). SharePoint storage is MOCKED.
